title: oldenlandia dichotoma
intro: Oldenlandia dichotoma, also known as "Broken Heart" or "Oldenlandia", is a flowering plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia dichotoma include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of fever and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
